source_old_req: The ADIRUp_solve thread shall operate periodically with a period of 4000 ms and a deadline of 500 ms, executing within a compute execution time range of 400 ms to 500 ms, with a priority of 4 and a stack size of 20 KByte. It shall assume that all input data ports solver_in1 through solver_in5 contain valid SHM_DataType::accData values at the start of each execution cycle. The thread shall guarantee that the values propagated through solver_in4, solver_in5, and solver_in6 depend solely on the current values received on solver_in1 through solver_in6 and the internal computations performed during the current execution cycle. Additionally, the thread shall guarantee that all internal state updates maintain the integrity of the SHM_DataType::accData values on the input ports, ensuring no invalid data types or out-of-range values are introduced into the system.
natural_requirement: The ADIRUp_solve component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for ADIRUp_solve.impl. In the implementation layer, ADIRUp_solve.impl shall route data flow from solver_in1 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para1 through C1 and data flow from solver_in2 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para2 through C2.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall route the data flow from solver_in1 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para1 through connection C1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from solver_in1 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para1.

requirement_items.text: The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall route the data flow from solver_in2 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para2 through connection C2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from solver_in2 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para2.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from solver_in1 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para1. The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from solver_in2 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para2.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall route the data flow from solver_in1 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para1 through connection C1. The ADIRUp_solve.impl implementation shall route the data flow from solver_in2 to ADIRUp_solve.inData_para2 through connection C2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
